name: newsman_list_all
description: Read-only. Lists NewsMAN lists available to the authenticated account.

name: newsman_import_status
description: Read-only. Gets the status of a NewsMAN background import task.

name: newsman_import_csv
description: Creates a NewsMAN CSV import task only when dry_run=false and confirm=true. Defaults to dry-run preview.

segments.description: Segment IDs or tag_ names. Use an empty array for list-only import.

csv_data.description: UTF-8 comma-delimited CSV with an email header.

name: newsman_segment_all
description: Read-only. Lists all NewsMAN segments for a list.

name: newsman_segment_count
description: Read-only. Counts active subscribers in a NewsMAN segment.

name: newsman_segment_refresh
description: Live action. Refreshes a NewsMAN segment only after explicit approval and confirm=true.

name: newsman_automation_all
description: Read-only. Lists NewsMAN automations for a list and date range.

name: newsman_automation_stats
description: Read-only. Returns NewsMAN automation stats for a list.

name: newsman_automation_set_workflow_status
description: Live action. Changes a NewsMAN automation workflow status only after explicit approval and confirm=true.
